name: same_army_unit_2_reference_styles_across_2_threads
description: Same Army unit, 2 reference styles across 2 threads
expected_output: Single client entity: 51 Sub Area (Colonel). Urgent task: Delivery must happen tomorrow — unit relocating next week.

notes: Unit relocation context adds urgency — agent should also flag relocation as risk to payment timeline
